3	Stefan Georgi
BONUS 6	Video 1 - Mini Sales Letter - Sports Betting
Writing Mini Sales Letters
VIDEO 1
Mini Sales Letter - Sports Betting
(00:01)
Hey, so in this module, I want to go ahead and share how using the copy
outline for RMBC would apply for shorter copy. The short version of that is that
for research, mechanism and brief, it’s pretty much all the same. I’m talking
about mini sales letters, 3 to 5 minute videos, things like that. It’s pretty much
the exact same thing that you would do for longer form copy. You still need to
do research because you still need to know who you’re talking about, existing
solutions, why they’re good, why they aren’t good, the market’s pain points,
their hopes, victories, dreams, failures, everything like that. You still need a
unique mechanism, in my opinion, for anything you’re selling ever and then for
a brief, you should still be talking about what you’re selling and answering all
the questions that you have and things like that. The big difference is that for
a mini sales letter, like this one I’m going to go through right now that’s about
1,346 words including the headline, is it’ll still actually cover a lot of these
things, but it’ll be a lot shorter. That’s really the answer; you could still totally
do this template and use shorter stuff.
(01:20)
So this is for the sports betting people that I used to work for back in the day.
I know I did another example somewhere else in this, but let me just read
through it with you and I’ll show you the different sections because we’ve got
our outline here and we’ve got it here.
(01:41)
“Why have 7 of Asia’s richest football betters decided to join forces and give
away every winning secret that they know? Hint: It has to do with the Chinese
New Year, €124 million fortune, and your email inbox. Intrigued? Keep reading.”
I think I wrote this in 2014, originally. This was written right back in the day
when I was doing RMBC, probably right around there. I don’t know if I’d even
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 12 --

4	Stefan Georgi
BONUS 6	Video 1 - Mini Sales Letter - Sports Betting
codified the outline, but I still had the structure and was using it as you’re
going to see.
(02:13)
“Dear Reader, My name is Jian Lau and I’m the leader of a group of betters
known across Asia as The “Lucky 7.” We’ve earned that title by earning the
equivalent of €124, 291,888 in the last 3 and a half years - all through our
football betting and today, we’re going to show you the secret to our success.
Inside this short letter, you’re going to be given the opportunity to start
winning an unprecedented 8 out of every 10 football bets you make. You’ll
do it without spending hours in front of your computer each day. You’ll do it
without becoming a victim of the tipster “sharks” who are increasingly filling
the web - the ones who lure you into their sites with the bait of easy money,
only to leave you high and dry. And you’ll do it all on your own terms, making
as much as you want when you want to.
(02:50)
Now we know that while the message we’re sharing with you may sound
intriguing, you’re likely also skeptical. So all we ask is that you put your
judgements on hold for two minutes while we explain who we are and why
we want to transform you into a long-term permanent winner.” Okay. So does
it call out the the pain point or the problem? Yeah, without spending hours in
front of your computer, without being a victim to tipster “sharks” who leave
you high and dry, doing it on your own terms, but really, this used to be the
pain point or the problem or a solution that saves time and money. “You’ll do
it on your own terms,” it definitely has a promise. “You will do it on your own
terms, making as much as you want when you want to”. Again, the opposite,
you’ll do this without these pain points. “The opportunity to start winning an
unprecedented 8 out of 10 football bets you make,” so it totally has it.
(03:48)
Emotional discovery story. No, it doesn’t have that, doesn’t tease that, but it
does have a curiosity aspect to it. Does it tease the unique mechanism? No,
and it could have. It could have been like, “All throughout football betting, by
using one weird lucky dragon football betting technique,” or something like
that. You could have teased the mechanism in here still. The contrarian stuff
it does when it talked about not spending time in front of your computer,
not using sharks, or tipsters, things like that. So just a contrarian aspect. No
fascinations, although, the headline itself is a fascination. It’s very curiosity-
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 12 --

5	Stefan Georgi
BONUS 6	Video 1 - Mini Sales Letter - Sports Betting
intense and by the way, there’s specificity to it. Addressing skepticism. Yeah,
we know you’re skeptical, but just put your judgement on hold and we’ll explain.
Lucky 7 is a good curiosity thing, too. Credibility well, that they’ve won this
much money from their football betting. No qualifier; probably could have
had a qualifier. That would’ve made it much longer. Just be like, “And this is
something that anyone can do.” No testimonials for this oneut again, it ticks
all the boxes.
(05:17)
Now here’s the background story. What are we looking for? Who am I? Credibility
builders when appropriate, me or someone close to me was in pain, here’s the
emotional story, traditional solutions and advice not working, trigger event,
search for truth/answers, meets wise sensei.
(05:35)
“Individually, we were “good,” but together we were unstoppable. Like I
mentioned, The “Lucky 7” is a group comprised of 7 of the most successful
football betters in all of Asia. Our combined experience totals more than 150
years and every single one of us was making at least €1 million annually before
we came together. Have you ever dreamed of an easier, simpler and more
prosperous life? One where you aren’t dependent on a boss or a credit limit?
Or where you and your family aren’t held captive by a budget that never seems
to be enough? For each of our 7 members, that dream was achieved long ago,
and we were able to liberate ourselves from the daily grind, the headaches
and the hassles that come from ordinary, everyday life solely by betting on the
football matches we love to watch anyway. Now you’re probably wondering
what this has to do with you? Or why, if we were successful already, we decided
to join forces at all? Let me explain.”
(06:19)
So you’ve got the “who am I” credibility factor there. We’re calling out the pain
point by asking have you ever dreamed of this stuff? They weren’t in pain, but
they were talking about the pain point.
(06:32)
“The world of elite and truly profitable football betters is extremely small.
We’d known about each other for a long time before we ever came together
and we all had nothing but respect for one another. But when fate brought
us into the same VIP suite of the 2010 World Cup in South Africa, it quickly
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

6	Stefan Georgi
BONUS 6	Video 1 - Mini Sales Letter - Sports Betting
became apparent that we were meant to work together. You see, we realized
that while each of us was already making more than €1 million per year in
profits on our football betting, we were all doing it in different ways.”
(06:56)
So basically, it’s the trigger event. It’s not really based on a pain point, but this
is the trigger event. They all came together and realized that they were doing
things differently and then this is going to get into the unique mechanism.
Now, what is the story behind RMBC and why am I here? Why am I making
this course besides the fact that as I say, it can help you to consistently write
better sales copy in less time. But why? So I started writing sales copy in
2012. I had a corporate job in South Florida doing outside sales and my now
wife, Laura - at the time, we had just recently met - she was writing copy and
I was tired of being outside all day in the hot Florida sun and coming home
and she was making five or ten times more than I was, at home drinking a
beer in her pajamas or underwear just writing copy and I’m like, “Man, I want
to do that, too.”
(07:10)
“In other words, each of us was using completely different strategies and getting
insight info from completely different sources to achieve something that less
than 0.001% of all people on the planet were achieving. Consistent, million-
euro profits that were earned solely from football betting. As we continued to
talk, it became extremely obvious that if we joined forces instead of working on
our own, we could multiply each other’s wins exponentially and so we banded
together and the results have exceeded even our wildest expectations. Since
joining forces in the summer of 2010, our group has brought in €124 million in
pure profit ensuring that each of us could never place another bet again if we
didn’t want to and still be multimillionaires forever, which is why now as a way
of saying “thank you” for the incredible blessings we’ve received, we’re going
to give you an extremely rare opportunity to join our group and start placing
winning bets right alongside of us.”
(07:56)
So there’s not really a mechanism of a problem and the mechanism of the
solution is really just that all these successful betters were having success in
different ways so if they joined forces, they could be even more successful.
It’s pretty basic, but that is the unique mechanism or the unique reason this
offer is different, why working with them would be different. Then as far as
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

7	Stefan Georgi
BONUS 6	Video 1 - Mini Sales Letter - Sports Betting
the product buildup and reveal goes, again, we’re going to have a ton of this
stuff, we’re going to have a reason why they’re sharing it.
(08:24)
“You see, in the Chinese calendar, 2014 is the Year of the Horse. It’s a time
of special opportunity where those who are kind to others and who join in
business ventures of others are extremely well rewarded. So what better time
to start sharing our incredible wealth than right now? Ready to join us? Here’s
what you need to do. After several serious discussions, our group has decided
that the best way to give back is to accept a small group of outsiders into our
ranks and then tell those lucky few initiates exactly how we’re betting each
and every day. After all, what could be simpler than that?
(08:53)
All you have to do the sign up below and decide for how many days you want
to receive our insider bets. Then, we’ll send out a new email to you each
morning, telling you the one single bet that all seven of us have agreed is the
absolute highest probability winner. Inside your email, you’ll even get specific
instructions on how to bet, stuff like whether to choose the over/under, whether
to pick the home or away team to win, whether to take the first half prop bet,
et cetera. Whatever the seven of us have decided is the most certain winner,
the bet we’re putting the vast majority of our bankroll on for that day because
we’re so confident in our analysis and intel. That’s what we’ll give you. To get
started, simply choose from the options below and click “add to cart.”
(09:25)
Again, we do have the product details. We’re building up the value. We’re not
doing testimonials, we’re not discussing or dismissing other alternatives but
we are explaining what happens, how the product works. We’re not really
doing scarcity. We did the personal mission with it being the year of the pig or
horse or whatever it is. Not really doing a price justification here, but we are
doing that and then we get to the call to action. So we’re working a little more
selective. Again, first call-to-action, what happens after you click the button.
(10:02)
“To get started, simply choose from the options below and click “add to cart.”
On the next page, you’ll provide your basic information, including your email
address and hit “submit.” Then the very next morning you’ll receive your first
email. You’ll sit in amazement as your life is immediately transformed in
